name: Google OR-Tools
changelog: Added support for multi-objective optimization in CP-SAT solver. Improved routing library performance by 20% on large-scale VRPTW instances. New Python 3.12 wheel builds.

name: Gurobi Optimizer
changelog: Performance improvements in concurrent MIP solver. New nonlinear objective support for quadratic programs. Enhanced Python API with type hints and async solve support.

name: PyVRP
changelog: Added electric vehicle routing variant with nonlinear charging. New multi-depot support. Improved ALNS destroy operators for pickup-and-delivery problems. Breaking: revised Solution API.

name: SCIP Optimization Suite
changelog: New GNN-based branching callback interface. Improved symmetry detection for constraint programming. PySCIPOpt now supports callback-based lazy constraints natively.

name: SimPy
changelog: Added priority resource with preemption policies. New real-time simulation mode for digital twin applications. Improved logging and event tracing for healthcare simulation models.

name: CPLEX Studio
changelog: Benders decomposition engine now supports user-defined optimality cuts. New OPL connector for Python dataframes. Warm-start improvements for successive MIP solves in rolling-horizon scheduling.
